title: Talks to Machines
summary: You use your organic brain like a computer, interfacing “wirelessly” with any electronic device. You can control and influence them in ways that others can’t.
tiers: Tier 3: Intelligent Interface or Command Machine
Tier 6: Control Machine or Improved Machine Companion
gm_intrusions: The machine malfunctions or acts unpredictably.
text: You use your organic brain like a computer, interfacing “wirelessly” with any electronic device. You can control and influence them in ways that others can’t.
